---
title: "Equation Numbering Test"
format: docx
---

## Introduction

This document tests equation numbering post-processing for Supporting
Information files.

The concentration is calculated as:

$$
C = \frac{N}{V}
$$ {#eq-conc}

Additional characterization data are presented below.

$$
y = \alpha + \beta x + \epsilon
$$ {#eq-reg}
